title: Rename device - UI
scenario: Device Name setting is displayed in Device Settings > General when a device is attached, matching Figma design specification
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth audio device is connected to the phone.
4. Tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
5. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the "General" option.
6. Observe the "Device Name" setting displayed in the General section.
expected: The "Device Name" setting is present in Device Settings > General and matches the Figma design specification (correct label, placement, and styling).
